comments: Approved. The drafted contract correctly bounds implementation to creating the templates/workflows/ directory, generating the 17 YAML workflow templates aligned to the Archon default scenarios, and modifying bin/agent-protocol-init to copy those templates into target repositories. The contract scope also correctly frames YAML nodes as intent-generating workflow definitions for the L2/L3 execution-contract model rather than direct LLM runtime execution. Its out_of_scope section properly forbids implementing the Node.js/TypeScript DAG execution runner at this stage, excludes SubAgent review automation daemon work planned for M4, forbids legacy tool removal, and prohibits active workflow/dispatch state semantic changes beyond normal M3 progression. The allowed_files list matches the intended change surface, and the stop conditions reinforce the scope boundary.
